summary: Backend and frontend testing for iteration 2 completed. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend routes /server-config and /whatsapp-settings work correctly. Login page renders with correct buttons.

test_credentials.note: Test user and session created by previous testing agent

seed_data_creation: None (used existing test user from iteration 1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 2 are working correctly. Backend tests verify: GET /api/health (200), GET/PUT /api/whatsapp/settings (401 without auth), POST /api/cash-register/open, GET /api/cash-register/current (returns total_products), POST /api/cash-register/close (triggers background daily summary), GET /api/appointments/?status_filter=completed|pending (returns service_name/service_price). Frontend routes /server-config and /whatsapp-settings render correctly. Server-config shows web fallback on web platform. WhatsApp Business API is MOCKED (will fail gracefully without real Meta API credentials).

tested_features.appointments_status_filter_completed: PASS - GET /api/appointments/?status_filter=completed filters correctly and returns service_name/service_price
tested_features.cash_register_close_daily_summary: PASS - POST /api/cash-register/close works and triggers background daily summary task
tested_features.frontend_login_page: PASS - Renders with 'Entrar com Google' and 'Agendar Horário' buttons
tested_features.frontend_server_config_route: PASS - /server-config renders web fallback message correctly
tested_features.frontend_booking_flow: PASS - Booking page loads and shows services

mocked_apis_note: WhatsApp Business API (send_whatsapp_message, send_daily_summary) is MOCKED - will fail gracefully without real Meta API credentials but logs attempts correctly
